---
title: "Real or Simulated?"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: false
    theme:
      dark: darkly
      light: cosmo
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.27.0.min.js"></script>
          <style>
          #quiz-app { max-width: 900px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 20px; font-family: inherit; }
          .quiz-intro h2 { color: #6c9bd2; margin-bottom: 0.5em; }
          .quiz-intro ul { font-size: 1.05em; line-height: 1.8; }
          .option-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; margin: 12px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; }
          .option-label { font-weight: bold; min-width: 100px; color: #aaa; }
          .option-btn-group { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
          .option-btn {
            padding: 10px 20px; border: 2px solid #555; border-radius: 8px;
            background: #2b3e50; color: #ddd; cursor: pointer; font-size: 1em;
            transition: all 0.15s;
          }
          .option-btn:hover { border-color: #4a90d9; }
          .option-btn.selected { border-color: #4a90d9; background: #14549e; color: white; }
          .btn-start {
            display: inline-block; padding: 14px 40px; font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: bold;
            border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 1.5em;
            background: #4a90d9; color: white; transition: background 0.2s;
          }
          .btn-start:hover { background: #3a7bc8; }

          /* Quiz phase */
          .quiz-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px; }
          .quiz-score { font-size: 1.1em; color: #6c9bd2; }
          .quiz-progress { color: #aaa; font-size: 0.95em; }
          .quiz-difficulty { display: inline-block; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px;
            font-size: 0.85em; font-weight: bold; }
          .quiz-difficulty.easy { background: #1a9850; color: white; }
          .quiz-difficulty.medium { background: #e6a817; color: black; }
          .quiz-difficulty.hard { background: #d73027; color: white; }
          .quiz-difficulty.pseudo { background: #7b3294; color: white; }

          .quiz-row { display: flex; align-items: stretch; gap: 16px; margin: 12px 0; }
          .quiz-col { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
          .quiz-vs { flex: 0 0 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.3em; font-weight: bold; color: #666; }
          .quiz-btn {
            width: 100%; min-height: 320px; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center; justify-content: flex-start;
            border: 2px solid #555; border-radius: 8px; background: #1a1a2e;
            color: #ddd; cursor: pointer; padding: 8px; transition: all 0.2s;
          }
          .quiz-btn:hover:not(:disabled) { border-color: #4a90d9; }
          .quiz-btn:disabled { cursor: default; opacity: 0.85; }
          .quiz-btn-correct { border-color: #1a9850 !important; background: #0d2818 !important; }
          .quiz-btn-wrong { border-color: #d73027 !important; background: #2d0f0f !important; }
          .quiz-btn .series-label { font-size: 1.1em; font-weight: bold; margin: 4px 0; }
          .quiz-btn .chart-container { width: 100%; flex: 1; min-height: 250px; }

          .quiz-controls { text-align: center; margin: 12px 0; }
          .quiz-nav-btn {
            padding: 10px 24px; margin: 4px; font-size: 1em; border: 2px solid #555;
            border-radius: 8px; background: #222; color: #ddd; cursor: pointer;
          }
          .quiz-nav-btn:hover { border-color: #4a90d9; color: white; }
          .quiz-nav-btn.primary { background: #4a90d9; border-color: #4a90d9; color: white; }

          .explanation-panel {
            background: #111; border: 1px solid #444; border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 16px; margin: 12px 0; display: none;
          }
          .explanation-panel.show { display: block; }

          .length-selector { margin: 8px 0; }
          .length-selector label { color: #aaa; margin-right: 8px; }
          .length-selector select {
            background: #222; color: #ddd; border: 1px solid #555;
            padding: 6px 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.95em;
          }

          /* Results */
          .results-cards { display: flex; gap: 16px; margin: 16px 0; flex-wrap: wrap; }
          .result-card {
            flex: 1; min-width: 200px; padding: 20px; border-radius: 8px;
            text-align: center;
          }
          .result-card.score { background: #14549e; color: white; }
          .result-card.baseline { background: #333; color: #ddd; }
          .result-card .big-num { font-size: 2.5em; font-weight: bold; }
          .result-card .label { font-size: 0.9em; opacity: 0.8; }

          @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .quiz-row { flex-direction: column; }
            .quiz-vs { flex: 0 0 30px; }
            .quiz-btn { min-height: 250px; }
            .option-row { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
          }
          </style>
          <script>
          if (!localStorage.getItem('quarto-color-scheme')) {
            document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-bs-theme', 'dark');
          }
          </script>
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(targets)
store_path <- if (dir.exists("_targets")) "_targets" else
  file.path(here::here(), "docs/_targets")
tar_config_set(store = store_path)
utils_path <- if (file.exists("vignette_utils.R")) "vignette_utils.R" else
  file.path(here::here(), "docs/vignette_utils.R")
source(utils_path)
```

```{r}
#| label: quiz-app
#| results: asis

quiz_json <- safe_tar_read("quiz_json")

cat('<div id="quiz-app">')

# ── Instructions phase ──────────────────────────────────────
cat('
<div id="phase-instructions" class="quiz-intro">
  <h2>Which time series is real?</h2>
  <ul>
    <li>Each round shows two cumulative return series side by side</li>
    <li>One is from a real trading strategy; the other is statistically simulated</li>
    <li>Click the series you think is <b>real</b></li>
    <li>After your guess, a reveal shows the answer with labelled full-length series</li>
    <li>Shorter visible windows and harder difficulty levels earn bonus points</li>
  </ul>

  <div class="option-row">
    <span class="option-label">Difficulty</span>
    <div class="option-btn-group" id="grp-diff">
      <button class="option-btn" onclick="setDiff(\'easy\',this)">Easy</button>
      <button class="option-btn" onclick="setDiff(\'medium\',this)">Medium</button>
      <button class="option-btn" onclick="setDiff(\'hard\',this)">Hard</button>
      <button class="option-btn selected" onclick="setDiff(\'mixed\',this)">Mixed</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="option-row">
    <span class="option-label">Questions</span>
    <div class="option-btn-group" id="grp-nq">
      <button class="option-btn selected" onclick="setNq(5,this)">5</button>
      <button class="option-btn" onclick="setNq(10,this)">10</button>
      <button class="option-btn" onclick="setNq(20,this)">20</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="text-align:center;">
    <button class="btn-start" onclick="startQuiz()">Start Quiz</button>
  </div>
</div>
')

# ── Quiz phase ���─────────────────────────────────────────────
cat('
<div id="phase-quiz" style="display:none;">
  <div class="quiz-header">
    <div class="quiz-score">Score: <b id="score">0</b> / <span id="max-score">0</span></div>
    <div class="quiz-progress">
      <span id="diff-badge" class="quiz-difficulty"></span>
      Round <span id="round-num">1</span> / <span id="round-total">5</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="length-selector">
    <label>Visible length:</label>
    <select id="length-select" onchange="updateCharts()">
      <option value="100">100 points (1x)</option>
      <option value="50">50 points (1.5x)</option>
      <option value="25">25 points (2x)</option>
      <option value="15">15 points (3x)</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="quiz-row">
    <div class="quiz-col">
      <button class="quiz-btn" id="btn-a" onclick="guess(\'A\')">
        <span class="series-label">Series A</span>
        <div class="chart-container" id="chart-a"></div>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="quiz-vs">VS</div>
    <div class="quiz-col">
      <button class="quiz-btn" id="btn-b" onclick="guess(\'B\')">
        <span class="series-label">Series B</span>
        <div class="chart-container" id="chart-b"></div>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="explanation-panel" id="reveal">
    <div id="reveal-text"></div>
    <div id="reveal-chart" style="height:220px;margin-top:8px;"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="quiz-controls">
    <button class="quiz-nav-btn" id="btn-next" onclick="nextRound()" style="display:none;">
      Next Round &rarr;
    </button>
    <button class="quiz-nav-btn primary" id="btn-finish" onclick="showResults()" style="display:none;">
      Finish
    </button>
  </div>
</div>
')

# ── Results phase ─────────────────���─────────────────────────
cat('
<div id="phase-results" style="display:none;">
  <h2 style="color:#6c9bd2;">Quiz Complete</h2>
  <div class="results-cards">
    <div class="result-card score">
      <div class="big-num" id="final-pct">0%</div>
      <div class="label">Your Score</div>
      <div id="final-score-detail"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="result-card baseline">
      <div class="big-num">50%</div>
      <div class="label">Random Guessing</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="results-breakdown" style="margin:16px 0;"></div>
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:16px;">
    <button class="quiz-nav-btn primary" onclick="location.reload()">Try Again</button>
    <a href="falsification.html" class="quiz-nav-btn" style="text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;">
      Falsification Methodology
    </a>
  </div>
</div>
')

cat('</div>') # close quiz-app

# ── Embed quiz data ─────────────────────────────────────────
cat('<script id="quiz-data-json" type="application/json">\n')
if (!is.null(quiz_json)) cat(quiz_json)
cat('\n</script>\n')

# ── Quiz JS logic ───────────────────────���───────────────────
cat('<script>\n')
cat('
var allRounds = JSON.parse(document.getElementById("quiz-data-json").textContent || "[]");
var S = {
  difficulty: "mixed",
  nq: 5,
  rounds: [],
  current: 0,
  score: 0,
  maxScore: 0,
  answered: false,
  answers: []
};

var diffMult = {easy:1, medium:2, hard:3, pseudo:4};
var lenMult = {100:1, 50:1.5, 25:2, 15:3};
var plotLayout = {
  paper_bgcolor:"transparent", plot_bgcolor:"transparent",
  font:{color:"#ccc",size:11}, margin:{t:5,b:25,l:35,r:5},
  xaxis:{gridcolor:"#333",title:"",zeroline:false},
  yaxis:{gridcolor:"#333",title:"$1 growth",zeroline:false},
  showlegend:false
};

function setDiff(d, btn) {
  S.difficulty = d;
  document.querySelectorAll("#grp-diff .option-btn").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("selected");});
  btn.classList.add("selected");
}

function setNq(n, btn) {
  S.nq = n;
  document.querySelectorAll("#grp-nq .option-btn").forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove("selected");});
  btn.classList.add("selected");
}

function startQuiz() {
  // Filter rounds by difficulty
  var pool = S.difficulty === "mixed" ? allRounds.slice() :
    allRounds.filter(function(r){ return r.difficulty === S.difficulty; });
  // Shuffle
  for (var i = pool.length - 1; i > 0; i--) {
    var j = Math.floor(Math.random() * (i + 1));
    var tmp = pool[i]; pool[i] = pool[j]; pool[j] = tmp;
  }
  S.rounds = pool.slice(0, Math.min(S.nq, pool.length));
  S.current = 0; S.score = 0; S.maxScore = 0;
  S.answers = new Array(S.rounds.length).fill(null);

  document.getElementById("phase-instructions").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("phase-quiz").style.display = "block";
  document.getElementById("round-total").textContent = S.rounds.length;
  renderRound();
}

function cumGrowth(ret) {
  var c = [1];
  for (var i = 0; i < ret.length; i++) c.push(c[i] * (1 + ret[i]));
  return c;
}

function renderRound() {
  var r = S.rounds[S.current];
  S.answered = false;
  document.getElementById("round-num").textContent = S.current + 1;
  var badge = document.getElementById("diff-badge");
  badge.className = "quiz-difficulty " + r.difficulty;
  badge.textContent = r.difficulty.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + r.difficulty.slice(1) +
    " (" + diffMult[r.difficulty] + "x)";

  document.getElementById("btn-a").className = "quiz-btn";
  document.getElementById("btn-b").className = "quiz-btn";
  document.getElementById("btn-a").disabled = false;
  document.getElementById("btn-b").disabled = false;
  document.getElementById("btn-next").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("btn-finish").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("reveal").className = "explanation-panel";

  updateScore();
  updateCharts();
}

function updateCharts() {
  if (S.rounds.length === 0) return;
  var r = S.rounds[S.current];
  var len = parseInt(document.getElementById("length-select").value);
  var a = r.series_a.slice(-len);
  var b = r.series_b.slice(-len);

  Plotly.react("chart-a", [{y:cumGrowth(a), type:"scatter", mode:"lines",
    line:{color:"#4a90d9",width:2}}], plotLayout, {displayModeBar:false,scrollZoom:true});
  Plotly.react("chart-b", [{y:cumGrowth(b), type:"scatter", mode:"lines",
    line:{color:"#e6a817",width:2}}], plotLayout, {displayModeBar:false,scrollZoom:true});
}

function updateScore() {
  document.getElementById("score").textContent = S.score;
  document.getElementById("max-score").textContent = S.maxScore;
}

function guess(choice) {
  if (S.answered) return;
  S.answered = true;
  var r = S.rounds[S.current];
  var correct = (choice === r.answer);
  var len = parseInt(document.getElementById("length-select").value);
  var pts = diffMult[r.difficulty] * lenMult[len];
  S.maxScore += pts;
  if (correct) S.score += pts;
  S.answers[S.current] = choice;

  document.getElementById("btn-a").disabled = true;
  document.getElementById("btn-b").disabled = true;
  if (r.answer === "A") {
    document.getElementById("btn-a").classList.add("quiz-btn-correct");
    if (choice === "B") document.getElementById("btn-b").classList.add("quiz-btn-wrong");
  } else {
    document.getElementById("btn-b").classList.add("quiz-btn-correct");
    if (choice === "A") document.getElementById("btn-a").classList.add("quiz-btn-wrong");
  }

  // Show reveal
  var verdict = correct ?
    "<span style=\\"color:#1a9850;font-weight:bold\\">Correct!</span>" :
    "<span style=\\"color:#d73027;font-weight:bold\\">Wrong.</span>";
  document.getElementById("reveal-text").innerHTML =
    verdict + " Series " + r.answer + " was real.<br>" +
    "<b>Real:</b> " + r.real_source + "<br>" +
    "<b>Simulated:</b> " + r.sim_source + "<br>" +
    "<b>Points:</b> " + (correct ? "+" + pts : "0") +
    " (difficulty " + diffMult[r.difficulty] + "x, length " + lenMult[len] + "x)";
  document.getElementById("reveal").className = "explanation-panel show";

  // Reveal chart with full series labelled
  Plotly.react("reveal-chart", [
    {y:cumGrowth(r.full_real), type:"scatter", mode:"lines",
     line:{color:"#2ecc71",width:2}, name:"Real: "+r.real_source},
    {y:cumGrowth(r.full_sim), type:"scatter", mode:"lines",
     line:{color:"#e74c3c",width:2,dash:"dash"}, name:"Sim: "+r.sim_source}
  ], Object.assign({}, plotLayout, {showlegend:true,
    legend:{orientation:"h",x:0.5,xanchor:"center",y:-0.2,font:{color:"#ccc"}}}),
    {displayModeBar:false});

  updateScore();
  if (S.current < S.rounds.length - 1) {
    document.getElementById("btn-next").style.display = "inline-block";
  } else {
    document.getElementById("btn-finish").style.display = "inline-block";
  }
}

function nextRound() { S.current++; renderRound(); }

function showResults() {
  document.getElementById("phase-quiz").style.display = "none";
  document.getElementById("phase-results").style.display = "block";

  var pct = S.maxScore > 0 ? Math.round(S.score / S.maxScore * 100) : 0;
  document.getElementById("final-pct").textContent = pct + "%";
  document.getElementById("final-score-detail").textContent =
    S.score + " / " + S.maxScore + " points (" + S.rounds.length + " rounds)";

  // Breakdown by difficulty
  var diffs = ["easy","medium","hard","pseudo"];
  var html = "<table style=\\"width:100%;color:#ddd;border-collapse:collapse;\\">" +
    "<tr style=\\"border-bottom:1px solid #444;\\"><th style=\\"text-align:left;padding:6px;\\">Difficulty</th>" +
    "<th>Correct</th><th>Total</th><th>Rate</th></tr>";
  diffs.forEach(function(d) {
    var rounds_d = S.rounds.filter(function(r,i){ return r.difficulty===d; });
    if (rounds_d.length === 0) return;
    var correct_d = rounds_d.filter(function(r,i){
      var idx = S.rounds.indexOf(r);
      return S.answers[idx] === r.answer;
    }).length;
    html += "<tr style=\\"border-bottom:1px solid #333;\\"><td style=\\"padding:6px;\\">" +
      "<span class=\\"quiz-difficulty "+d+"\\">" + d.charAt(0).toUpperCase()+d.slice(1) + "</span></td>" +
      "<td style=\\"text-align:center;\\">" + correct_d + "</td>" +
      "<td style=\\"text-align:center;\\">" + rounds_d.length + "</td>" +
      "<td style=\\"text-align:center;\\">" + Math.round(correct_d/rounds_d.length*100) + "%</td></tr>";
  });
  html += "</table>";
  document.getElementById("results-breakdown").innerHTML = html;
}

// Arrow key navigation
document.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
  if (e.key === "ArrowRight" && S.answered) {
    if (S.current < S.rounds.length - 1) nextRound();
    else showResults();
  }
});

// Fallback if no data
if (allRounds.length === 0) {
  document.getElementById("phase-instructions").innerHTML =
    "<p>Quiz data not available. Run <code>tar_make()</code> first.</p>";
}
')
cat('</script>\n')
```

```{r}
#| label: build-info
#| results: asis
build_info()
```
